name: JKN Global Media Public Company Limited
summary: JKN Global Media Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in content distribution business in Thailand. It operates through three segments: Sales of Program Rights, Advertising Services, and Other Business. The company is involved in the distribution of contents of the movies, series, and documentaries, as well as the production and distribution of related DVD and Blu-ray. It also provides advertising services, as well as produces television programs. In addition, the company offers studio leasing, costume rental, and artist management services, as well as organizes events. It also exports its products. JKN Global Media Public Company Limited was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Nakhon Pathom, Thailand.
